title: First Time Cumulative Debit Exceeds 500
description: Write a SQL query using window functions to produce the requested analytical output.¥n¥n### Tables¥n```sql¥nCREATE TABLE accounts (¥n  account_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,¥n  owner_name TEXT NOT NULL,¥n  segment TEXT NOT NULL¥n);¥n¥nCREATE TABLE transactions (¥n  txn_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,¥n  account_id INTEGER NOT NULL,¥n  txn_date TEXT NOT NULL,¥n  amount INTEGER NOT NULL,¥n  txn_type TEXT NOT NULL¥n);¥n```¥n¥n### Task¥nFor each account, return the first debit transaction where cumulative debit exceeds 500.¥n¥n### Return Columns¥n- `account_id`¥n- `txn_id`¥n- `txn_date`¥n- `running_debit_total`¥n¥n### Ordering¥nSort by `account_id` ASC.¥n¥n### Notes¥n- Use SQLite syntax.¥n- Write your answer in `solution.sql`.¥n- Do not hardcode output rows; query from tables.¥n- Internal hidden tests run against additional seed data.
constraints: SQLite 3.44+¥n- Single query unless the prompt explicitly asks for CTEs¥n- Deterministic output

starter_files.content: -- Hint: calculate running total in a CTE, then pick first row where total > 500.¥n

test_config.schema_sql: CREATE TABLE accounts (¥n  account_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,¥n  owner_name TEXT NOT NULL,¥n  segment TEXT NOT NULL¥n);¥n¥nCREATE TABLE transactions (¥n  txn_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,¥n  account_id INTEGER NOT NULL,¥n  txn_date TEXT NOT NULL,¥n  amount INTEGER NOT NULL,¥n  txn_type TEXT NOT NULL¥n);
